prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `337b420f`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 task package for `337b420f`. The rule is: split the `5 x 17` input into three `5 x 5` panels, keep the largest `4`-connected non-`8` component from each panel, then overlay those retained components into one `5 x 5` grid; if a retained component would overlap a larger already-placed one, shift it by one cell to the first valid in-bounds non-overlapping position. I discarded both summary hints: the Sonnet hint’s horizontal-flip claim is wrong, and the Opus hint overstates translation because most official examples need no movement.

The main code is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_337b420f/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_337b420f/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_337b420f/generator.py), [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_337b420f/helpers.py), and [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_337b420f/notes.md). No new primitive was added; `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was unchanged.

The generator matches the task family by constructing three retained connected motifs in a shared `5 x 5` frame, then deriving each input panel by adding one smaller same-color distractor on an `8` background with `0` separators, while keeping `8` as the panel-majority background so component extraction behaves like the official task. Validation passed end-to-end: `6/6` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/337b420f/previews/preview_01.png). Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/337b420f/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/337b420f/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/337b420f/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/337b420f/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/337b420f/previews/preview_03.png).
